style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;endArrow=classic;fontSize=9;strokeColor=#757575;" target="wait_call" value="<b>循环</b>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kernel_space" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=1;startSize=28;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#E65100;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="<b>内核空间（Kernel Space）</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="540" width="1060" x="20" y="261" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eventpoll_box" parent="kernel_space" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;align=left;spacingLeft=10;fontSize=10;fontFamily=Courier New;" value="<b>struct eventpoll</b><br><br> struct rb_root <b>rbr</b>;<br> struct list_head <b>rdllist</b>;<br> wait_queue_head_t <b>wq</b>;<br> struct mutex <b>mtx</b>;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="210" x="15" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rbr_container" parent="kernel_space" style="swimlane;horizontal=1;startSize=26;fillColor=#E8EAF6;strokeColor=#3949AB;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="<b>红黑树 (rbr) — O(logN) 增删查</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="330" width="370" x="245" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rb_root" parent="rbr_container" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1BEE7;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="<b>rb_root</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="80" x="145" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="epitem_root" parent="rbr_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1976D2;fontSize=10;" value="<b>epitem</b><br>fd=5 | events=POLLIN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="115" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="epitem_left" parent="rbr_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1976D2;fontSize=10;" value="<b>epitem</b><br>fd=4 | events=POLLIN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="135" x="15" y="195" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="epitem_right" parent="rbr_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1976D2;fontSize=10;" value="<b>epitem</b><br>fd=7 | events=POLLOUT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="135" x="220" y="195" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rb1" edge="1" parent="rbr_container" source="rb_root" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="epitem_root"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rb2" edge="1" parent="rbr_container" source="epitem_root" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="epitem_left"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rb3" edge="1" parent="rbr_container" source="epitem_root" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="epitem_right"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rdllist_container" parent="kernel_space" style="swimlane;horizontal=1;startSize=26;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="<b>就绪链表 (rdllist) — O(1) 获取就绪事件</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="330" width="415" x="630" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rdl_head" parent="rdllist_container" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#A5D6A7;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;" value="<b>head</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="55" x="15" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ready_a" parent="rdllist_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#43A047;strokeColor=#1B5E20;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="<b>就绪</b><br>epitem (fd=5)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="125" x="100" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ready_b" parent="rdllist_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#43A047;strokeColor=#1B5E20;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="<b>就绪</b><br>epitem (fd=7)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="125" x="255" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rdl1" edge="1" parent="rdllist_container" source="rdl_head" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2E7D32;strokeWidth=2;" target="ready_a"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rdl2" edge="1" parent="rdllist_container" source="ready_a" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2E7D32;strokeWidth=2;" target="ready_b"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nic_box" parent="kernel_space" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECEFF1;strokeColor=#607D8B;align=left;spacingLeft=8;fontSize=10;" value="<b>网卡硬件</b><br>数据到达 → DMA →<br>协议栈 → Socket 就绪" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="245" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="callback_box" parent="kernel_space" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE082;strokeColor=#FFB300;align=left;spacingLeft=8;fontSize=10;" value="<b>ep_poll_callback()</b><br>找到 epitem → 加入 rdllist<br>唤醒等待队列 (wq)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="455" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rbr_note" parent="kernel_space" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF9C4;strokeColor=#F9A825;align=left;spacingLeft=8;fontSize=9;" value="<b>每个 epitem 包含：</b><br>• rb_node（红黑树节点）<br>• fd（文件描述符）<br>• 回调函数指针<br>• rdllink（链表节点）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="715" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ep_to_rbr" edge="1" parent="kernel_space" source="eventpoll_box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#C62828;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#C62828;" target="rbr_container" value="<b>rbr 指针</b>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ep_to_rdl" edge="1" parent="kernel_space" source="eventpoll_box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#C62828;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#C62828;" target="rdllist_container" value="<b>rdllist 指针</b>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_nic_cb" edge="1" parent="kernel_space" source="nic_box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#FFB300;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#E65100;" target="callback_box" value="<b>触发</b>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_cb_rdl" edge="1" parent="kernel_space" source="callback_box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#FFB300;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#E65100;" target="rdllist_container" value="<b>将 epitem 加入 rdllist</b>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rbr_cb" edge="1" parent="kernel_space" source="rbr_container" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#607D8B;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#546E7A;" target="callback_box" value="fd 就绪时触发回调"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_create" edge="1" parent="1" source="create_call" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#C62828;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#C62828;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="eventpoll_box" value="<b>创建 eventpoll 实例</b>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ctl" edge="1" parent="1" source="ctl_call" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#FFB300;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#E65100;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="rbr_container" value="<b>注册 fd + 设置回调</b>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_wait" edge="1" parent="1" source="wait_call" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2E7D32;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#2E7D32;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="rdllist_container" value="<b>检查 rdllist (O(1))<br>返回就绪 fd</b>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="summary" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EAF6;strokeColor=#3949AB;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#1A237E;fontStyle=1;" value="<b>epoll 核心优势：</b>红黑树存储全部监听 fd（O(logN) 增删），就绪链表仅存活跃 fd（O(1) 获取），无需遍历全部 fd，突破 select/poll 的 O(N) 瓶颈" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="940" x="80" y="815" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 239, 241), rgb(31, 33, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(96, 125, 139), rgb(114, 139, 151));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 180px; height: 1px; padding-top: 701px; margin-left: 265px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
网卡硬件
数据到达 → DMA →
协议栈 → Socket 就绪

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 224, 130), rgb(72, 45, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 179, 0), rgb(143, 78, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 230px; height: 1px; padding-top: 701px; margin-left: 475px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ep_poll_callback()
找到 epitem → 加入 rdllist
唤醒等待队列 (wq)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 249, 196), rgb(33, 28, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(249, 168, 37), rgb(149, 79, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 190px; height: 1px; padding-top: 701px; margin-left: 735px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
每个 epitem 包含：
• rb_node（红黑树节点）
• fd（文件描述符）
• 回调函数指针
• rdllink（链表节点）

div.b:
检查 rdllist (O(1))
返回就绪 fd

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 234, 246), rgb(33, 35, 45)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(57, 73, 171), rgb(154, 168, 252));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 938px; height: 1px; padding-top: 834px; margin-left: 71px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1A237E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1A237E, #bfc7ff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: epoll 核心优势：红黑树存储全部监听 fd（O(logN) 增删），就绪链表仅存活跃 fd（O(1) 获取），无需遍历全部 fd，突破 select/poll 的 O(N) 瓶颈
